name: @tootallnate/gfpak
description: Parser for Game Freak's GFLXPACK (a.k.a. .gfpak) archive — used by Pokémon Let's Go, Pokémon Sword/Shield, Pokémon Legends Arceus, and Pokémon Scarlet/Violet to bundle game assets (BNTX textures, .gfbmdl models, .gfbanm animations, shaders) under FNV-1a 64-bit hashed paths. Decompresses LZ4 / Zlib payloads and exposes each entry as a lazy Blob.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
